basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 3 Project Associate-I Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. / B. Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering / Chemistry or related areas with minimum 70% marks / equivalent grade.
qualification.details: Project Associate-I (Post No. - 1): M.Sc. / B. Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering / Chemistry or related areas with minimum 70% marks / equivalent grade. Prior hands-on experience in yeast genetics, molecular biology, cell biology and biochemistry techniques are a must. Hands-on experience with budding yeast (Saccharomyces cerevisiae) strain construction, genetic crosses, transformations and standard yeast assays. Wet lab experience during Master's thesis is a must. Experience of having handled/completed multiple independent projects. Prior experience with fluorescence microscopy (widefield/confocal, live-cell imaging) and quantitative image analysis will be strongly preferred; familiarity with condensate biology, proteostasis or cellular aging is an advantage. Candidates with a valid NET/GATE qualification. Project Associate-I (Post No. - 2): M.Sc. / B. Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering / Chemistry or related areas with minimum 70% marks / equivalent grade. Prior experience in mouse handling, executing rodent behavioral assays, stereotaxic workflows, brain extraction, and tissue processing (cryosectioning) are a must. Previous work experience with molecular and cellular biology techniques will be highly preferred. Master's thesis project completed with a core focus on wet-lab neurobiology and behavioral neuroscience. Experience of having handled/completed multiple independent projects. Proficiency in standard molecular techniques, with specific preference for candidates experienced in DNA/RNA extraction from brain tissues, qPCR, immunohistochemistry, or neuro-epigenetics assays. Candidates with a valid NET/GPAT qualification. Project Associate-I (Post No. - 3): M.Sc. / B. Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering / Chemistry or related areas with minimum 70% marks / equivalent grade. Prior experience in genetics, molecular, cell biology and biochemistry techniques. Previous work experience in handling cell lines, cell culture and flow cytometry. Wet lab experience during Master's thesis. Experience of having handled/completed multiple independent projects. Prior experience in projects related to mutagenesis, cloning, gene editing, and protein-protein interactions. Candidates with a valid NET/GATE qualification.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 30,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance / Rs. 37,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance
salary_details.details: For candidates not having valid CSIR-NET / GATE / DBT - JRF / any other National Level Test conducted by Central Government Departments and their agencies OR equivalent scorecard: Rs. 30,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance. For candidates having valid CSIR-NET / GATE / DBT - JRF / any other National Level Test conducted by Central Government Departments and their agencies OR equivalent scorecard: Rs. 37,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Pune to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IISER Pune Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I (Post No. - 1): M.Sc. / B. Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering / Chemistry or related areas with minimum 70% marks / equivalent grade. Prior hands-on experience in yeast genetics, molecular biology, cell biology and biochemistry techniques are a must. Hands-on experience with budding yeast (Saccharomyces cerevisiae) strain construction, genetic crosses, transformations and standard yeast assays. Wet lab experience during Master's thesis is a must. Experience of having handled/completed multiple independent projects. Prior experience with fluorescence microscopy (widefield/confocal, live-cell imaging) and quantitative image analysis will be strongly preferred; familiarity with condensate biology, proteostasis or cellular aging is an advantage. Candidates with a valid NET/GATE qualification. Project Associate-I (Post No. - 2): M.Sc. / B. Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering / Chemistry or related areas with minimum 70% marks / equivalent grade. Prior experience in mouse handling, executing rodent behavioral assays, stereotaxic workflows, brain extraction, and tissue processing (cryosectioning) are a must. Previous work experience with molecular and cellular biology techniques will be highly preferred. Master's thesis project completed with a core focus on wet-lab neurobiology and behavioral neuroscience. Experience of having handled/completed multiple independent projects. Proficiency in standard molecular techniques, with specific preference for candidates experienced in DNA/RNA extraction from brain tissues, qPCR, immunohistochemistry, or neuro-epigenetics assays. Candidates with a valid NET/GPAT qualification. Project Associate-I (Post No. - 3): M.Sc. / B. Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering / Chemistry or related areas with minimum 70% marks / equivalent grade. Prior experience in genetics, molecular, cell biology and biochemistry techniques. Previous work experience in handling cell lines, cell culture and flow cytometry. Wet lab experience during Master's thesis. Experience of having handled/completed multiple independent projects. Prior experience in projects related to mutagenesis, cloning, gene editing, and protein-protein interactions. Candidates with a valid NET/GATE qualification.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Salary 2026
content_sections.text: For candidates not having valid CSIR-NET / GATE / DBT - JRF / any other National Level Test conducted by Central Government Departments and their agencies OR equivalent scorecard: Rs. 30,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance. For candidates having valid CSIR-NET / GATE / DBT - JRF / any other National Level Test conducted by Central Government Departments and their agencies OR equivalent scorecard: Rs. 37,000 + 30% House Rent Allowance.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Pune to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISER Pune Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate-I positions at IISER Pune is 31st July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. or B. Tech degree in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Bioengineering, Chemistry, or related fields with a minimum of 70% marks or an equivalent grade.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Associate-I posts is 35 years. Age relaxation may be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Project Associate-I positions announced by IISER Pune in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 30,000 + 30% HRA for candidates without a valid NET/GATE qualification, and Rs. 37,000 + 30% HRA for those with a valid NET/GATE or equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IISER Pune Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an initial screening of applications followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates with a B. Tech degree apply for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with a B. Tech degree in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Bioengineering, Chemistry, or related areas are eligible to apply, provided they meet the minimum marks requirement.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for the Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: Specific hands-on experience in molecular biology, cell biology, biochemistry, yeast genetics, mouse handling, behavioral assays, or cell culture techniques is preferred, depending on the specific post. Wet lab experience during Master's thesis is also a must.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Project Associate-I positions at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply online through the official website of IISER Pune or via the direct application link provided in the "Important Links" section before the last date of application.
